entry_transition.notes: Night-to-morning transition: fade from storm darkness to dawn light revealing the post-storm jungle and fresh tire tracks

exit_handoff.leaves_on: Player's decisive body language (leaning toward chosen path) with dust/motion blur beginning to form — checkpoint tension ('מרגישה את המתחרים נושפת בעורפי') unresolved, creating forward momentum
exit_handoff.next_scene_should_open_with: Mid-motion: player already committed to the chosen route, landscape rushing past, immediate consequence of M3 decision manifesting (either following map's promise or joining the chaotic race)

mood_arc: Shifts from M2's relief-after-survival to urgent competitive pressure. The morning reveal (הבוקר עלה) contrasts with immediate tactical dilemma — fresh tire tracks and engine noise create FOMO vs. map-trust tension. Ends on adrenaline spike as choice locks in.
visual_callbacks: Equipment from M2 shelter now packed/visible on player (continuity: we survived WITH our gear)
Wet jungle surfaces from storm (M2's rain aftermath) glistening in morning light
The crumpled map (tool A) is the SAME map from prior missions, now more worn — physical continuity object
rationale: Fade-from-black mirrors the night-to-day story beat. M2 ended on 'המסע האמיתי מתחיל' — M3 delivers that promise immediately with competitive pressure. Exit handoff keeps tension unresolved (competitors breathing down neck) so M4 can open mid-consequence rather than restarting energy. Visual callbacks ground the 72-hour continuity: same map, same gear, same jungle (now transformed by morning).
